name: mirofish-ko-oauthbridge
description: Korean-first MiroFish bundle with local OAuth bridge

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.setup:public: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:bridge
scripts.dev:all:raw: concurrently --kill-others -n "bridge,backend,frontend" -c "magenta,green,cyan" "npm run bridge" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
